calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Appointment Of Allan W. Green As Co Trustee Of Trust A
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Divide Gertrude Pauson Testamentary Trust Into Two Separate Trusts
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Frank Green (Petitioner).

Mr. Der stated that both Sons had been handling their own finances for several years, that they were planning for retirement, that they both wanted to invest in a different manner and that they both had Financial Advisors. In addition, he stated that they were not claiming that the Trustees breached any fiduciary duties and that the Mother and Sons wanted to keep things separate to minimize friction between the Brothers. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
Petition For Construction Of Trust Instrument : Memorandum Of Points And Auth. $133.00 Paid
